executive_summary: This PR introduces Jira integration for MindsDB, supporting both Jira Cloud (v3) and Jira Server/Data Center (v2).
It includes a new feature with bug fixes and documentation updates.
The changes require updates to test files and documentation.
Verification involves running unit tests and validating Jira integration.

change_units.title: Jira Integration Addition
change_units.description: Added Jira integration for MindsDB supporting Jira Cloud and Server/Data Center.
change_units.inferred_intent: Developers aimed to expand functionality to support multiple Jira platforms.
change_units.rationale: Direct mention in diff confirms the feature addition.

change_units.title: Connection Fix
change_units.description: Fixed connection handling and normalized connection data.
change_units.inferred_intent: Resolved issues related to connection parameters.
change_units.rationale: Clear evidence of bug resolution in diff.

change_units.title: Documentation Update
change_units.description: Updated documentation for ENV Variables and Jira Tables.
change_units.inferred_intent: Improved clarity and consistency in code comments.
change_units.rationale: Contextual inference from file naming and comments.

risks_and_concerns: Ensuring compatibility with Jira Server/Data Center version.
Verification of Jira Table data consistency post-update.

discrepancies: Line 45: 'Jira integration added' vs actual implementation details
Line 78: 'Connection fix' lacks specific parameter changes
